narrative:
Hicksville Township has 3,128 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.7 percentage points.
